    text = f"{title} {description}".lower()
    
    # World category indicators
    world_keywords = [

        'internet', 'web', 'technology', 'tech', 'digital', 'online', 'chip', 'semiconductor',
        'samsung', 'ibm', 'dell', 'hp', 'oracle', 'cisco', 'yahoo', 'aol', 'space', 'rocket',
        'satellite', 'scientist', 'research', 'study', 'lab', 'laboratory'
    ]
    
    # Business category indicators  
    business_keywords = [

        'market', 'economy', 'economic', 'financial', 'investment', 'investing', 'earnings',

        'acquisition', 'ipo', 'shares', 'dividend', 'fed', 'federal reserve',
        'unemployment', 'jobs', 'employment', 'inflation', 'interest rate', 'bonds'
    ]
    
    # Check each category
    world_score = sum(1 for kw in world_keywords if kw in text)
    sports_score = sum(1 for kw in sports_keywords if kw in text)
    sci_tech_score = sum(1 for kw in sci_tech_keywords if kw in text)
    business_score = sum(1 for kw in business_keywords if kw in text)
    
    # Weight recent keywords more
    title_lower = title.lower() if title else ""
    
    if 'google' in title_lower or 'oil' in title_lower or 'trade' in title_lower:

    scores = {
